docs.title: Trading Platform Documentation
docs.text: This documentation describes the architecture and operation of the algorithmic trading platform.

docs.title: Core Sections
docs.text: Architecture Services Event Pipelines Database Automation Observability Operations

docs.title: Event Pipeline
docs.text:
```mermaid graph TD

market_ticks --> market_candles market_candles --> validated_candles validated_candles --> market_context market_context --> strategy_inputs strategy_inputs --> strategy_engine strategy_engine --> strategy_signals strategy_signals --> signal_validator signal_validator --> policy_engine policy_engine --> risk_engine risk_engine --> execution_engine execution_engine --> broker_adapter broker_adapter --> execution_reports execution_reports --> portfolio_updates

docs.title: System Overview
docs.text:
The trading platform is designed as an event-driven distributed system.

Core architecture layers:

1 UI Layer 2 API Gateway 3 Event Bus 4 Trading Engine Services 5 Storage Layer 6 Infrastructure Layer
